title: Create Refabricated
description: Clientside Modpack for my private Survival Server focused around Create
body:
# Create Refabricated

currently just used for conecting to my private mc server

### future plans:
- include server side mods as an additional zip file, so everyone can spin up their own Create Refab server
- include server side mods in the pack for singleplayer functionality (maybe)

full mod list is available here:
wip
